title: AutoSmeltFood
description: Automatically smelts food dropped by those animals
body:
**AutoSmeltFood: Enhancing Your Minecraft Culinary Experience**

Say goodbye to the tedious process of cooking animal drops! This lightweight plugin automatically transforms raw meat into perfectly cooked delicacies the moment you slay an animal. Designed with both survival and quality-of-life improvements in mind, it streamlines your gameplay while maintaining balance.

**Key Features:**

Instant Food Transformation: Raw beef, porkchop, chicken, mutton, rabbit, cod, and salmon automatically cook when animals are slain.

Visual Satisfaction: Customizable flame particles appear at the kill location, providing visual confirmation of the cooking process.

Immersive Audio: Subtle sizzling sounds play when food is cooked, enhancing the realism without being intrusive.

Fine-Tuned Control:

Adjustable cooking chance percentage

Permission-based usage for server admins

Customizable food mapping for modded items

Easy configuration through config.yml


Server-Friendly: Optimized code ensures minimal impact on server performance, even with multiple players hunting simultaneously.

Command System: Simple administrative commands for reload and information:

/asf reload - Refreshes configuration

/asf info - Displays plugin information



**Why Choose This Plugin?**

This plugin offers the perfect balance between convenience and gameplay enhancement. While it eliminates the mundane cooking step, it maintains Minecraft's survival essence by still requiring you to hunt for food.

Server administrators will appreciate the lightweight design and configuration flexibility, while players will enjoy the seamless integration that feels like it belongs in vanilla Minecraft. The customization options ensure compatibility with various server setups, from hardcore survival to casual gameplay.

**Perfect For:**

Survival multiplayer servers seeking quality-of-life improvements

Roleplay servers with cooking-themed economies

Adventure maps where cooking time could break immersion

Any server looking to enhance player experience without dramatic gameplay changes

Upgrade your Minecraft culinary experience today with this essential utility that transforms every hunting expedition into an instant feast!
